formulas.name: Electric Potential
formulas.variables: V: electric potential, k: Coulomb's constant, q: charge, r: distance from charge
formulas.units: V: Volts, k: N*m^2/C^2, q: Coulombs, r: meters
formulas.notes: To find electric potential due to a point charge

formulas.name: Electric Potential Due to Multiple Charges
formulas.variables: V: electric potential, k: Coulomb's constant, qi: individual charges, ri: distance from each charge
formulas.units: V: Volts, k: N*m^2/C^2, qi: Coulombs, ri: meters
formulas.notes: To find electric potential at a point due to multiple point charges

formulas.name: Capacitance of a Capacitor
formulas.variables: C: capacitance, Q: charge, V: electric potential difference
formulas.units: C: Farads, Q: Coulombs, V: Volts
formulas.notes: To find capacitance of a capacitor

formulas.name: Capacitance of a Parallel Plate Capacitor
formulas.variables: C: capacitance, ε0: permittivity of free space, A: area of plates, d: distance between plates
formulas.units: C: Farads, ε0: F/m, A: m^2, d: meters
formulas.notes: To find capacitance of a parallel plate capacitor

formulas.name: Energy Stored in a Capacitor
formulas.variables: U: energy, C: capacitance, V: electric potential difference
formulas.units: U: Joules, C: Farads, V: Volts
formulas.notes: To find energy stored in a capacitor

formulas.name: Equivalent Capacitance of Capacitors in Series
formulas.variables: C: equivalent capacitance, Ci: individual capacitances
formulas.notes: To find equivalent capacitance of capacitors in series

formulas.name: Equivalent Capacitance of Capacitors in Parallel
formulas.variables: C: equivalent capacitance, Ci: individual capacitances
formulas.notes: To find equivalent capacitance of capacitors in parallel

formulas.name: Potential Difference Across a Capacitor
formulas.variables: V: electric potential difference, Q: charge, C: capacitance
formulas.units: V: Volts, Q: Coulombs, C: Farads
formulas.notes: To find potential difference across a capacitor

formulas.name: Electric Field Due to a Point Charge
formulas.variables: E: electric field, k: Coulomb's constant, q: charge, r: distance from charge
formulas.units: E: N/C, k: N*m^2/C^2, q: Coulombs, r: meters
formulas.notes: To find electric field due to a point charge

formulas.name: Electric Field Due to a Uniformly Charged Sphere
formulas.formula: E = k * Q / r^2 (for r >= R), E = k * Q * r / R^3 (for r < R)
formulas.variables: E: electric field, k: Coulomb's constant, Q: charge, r: distance from center, R: radius of sphere
formulas.units: E: N/C, k: N*m^2/C^2, Q: Coulombs, r: meters, R: meters
formulas.notes: To find electric field due to a uniformly charged sphere
